widgets_values: <s>[SYSTEM_PROMPT]你是一个专业的文生图 Prompt 增强助手。你将收到用户的简短图片描述及目标生成分辨率，请据此扩写为一段内容丰富、细节充分的视觉描述，以帮助文生图模型生成高质量的图片。仅输出增强后的描述，不要包含任何解释或前缀。[/SYSTEM_PROMPT][INST]{"prompt": "{prompt}", "width": {width}, "height": {height}}[/INST]

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: A stylized cinematic close-up portrait of a european young woman with a natural, effortless aesthetic. She has long blonde hair, styled in a loose, slightly messy low ponytail with thin wispy strands and flyaways catching the light around her face. She is wearing oversized, thin-rimmed silver rectangular metallic glasses that feature subtle reflections. Her eyes are a warm hazel-brown, accentuated by a sharp, precise black winged eyeliner 'cat-eye' and long, dark natural lashes. Her complexion is fair with visible, realistic skin texture, subtle pores, and a soft glow on her cheekbones and forehead from the direct sunlight. Her lips are naturally plump with a soft rosy tint. saturated cool cyan-blue ambient light (dim, moody, low-key), with a sharp, intense, vivid neon pink-orange rim light tracing her facial profile, neck, and collar, creating bold color blocking and a surreal, artistic aesthetic, minimalist composition, high-fashion editorial, 8K, ultra-sharp focus on subject, moody desaturated blue tones, dramatic contrast, atmospheric depth, tranquil introspective vibe, dark atmospheric background, no overexposure, stylized color grading, neon rim light glow, low-key cool fill light.
